summary: Staff platform / SRE engineer. 10 years across infra, on-call, and reliability programs. Pulled three orgs from heroic on-call to error-budgeted SLOs.

highlights: Drove the company's first SLO program; cut customer-facing minor incidents 60% YoY.
Designed and shipped the multi-region failover for the API gateway with a 4-minute RTO target, validated quarterly.
Wrote the incident-command playbook now used org-wide; ran two GameDays each quarter.
Migrated the monolith from VMs to k8s without an outage; rolled traffic over a quarter using header-based shadowing.
Built the autoscaler signal — a Prometheus rule + Lua filter in Envoy — that kept p99 within budget under flash sales.
Owned the Postgres on-call. Tuned vacuum and bloat-monitoring; reduced unplanned bloat-driven failover events to zero in two years.

projects.name: GatewayFailover
projects.description: Active-active multi-region API gateway built on Envoy + a custom external-authz service in Go. RTO target 4 minutes; quarterly DR validated.

projects.name: SLOProgram
projects.description: End-to-end SLO program — definitions, error-budget policy, weekly review ritual, and the dashboards behind them.
